infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: WanderNote uses your location to estimate distance to your travel destinations and display travel footprints on the map.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: WanderNote needs access to your photo library so you can add travel photos to your trip records.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: WanderNote needs camera access so you can take travel photos and save them to your trip records.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: WanderNote needs permission to save edited travel photos to your photo library.
